files.note: Recolored the suggested-approaches selection from accent/persimmon to sage/green (--auto-fg/--auto-bg) for the option cards, radio dots, and staged block.
Added a multi-approach variant: when a thread carries approaches[] (1-3), renders selectable radio-cards with trade-off tags; the chosen one drives the drafted reply and is staged on approve.
Added approachChoice/chooseApproach to the controller, taught stagedCount/runAgent to count approaches[], and gave the SSO dispute thread three suggested approaches.
Extended the stub controller with approach-choice methods and updated the standalone sample thread to the multi-approach shape.
Renamed file Net Prompt.dc.html → Prompt Tracer.dc.html.
Renamed to Prompt Tracer.dc.html.
Updated the dc-import to the renamed Prompt Tracer DC.
Reverted the template/placeholder rework back to the original concrete-scenario version per user; kept the 'Prompt tracer' eyebrow name.
Reworked live blocks to use template placeholder slots (<pr.thread> etc.) instead of baking in a specific PR, added a Template/Example-values toggle, and renamed the panel eyebrow to 'Prompt tracer'.
Renamed the settings tab to 'Prompt tracer' to match.

New settings tab showing the fully-assembled 'net prompt' a worker receives, with a scenario picker and source-tagged blocks (constant / from settings / live PR state) to reveal how it varies by PR, thread, CI and conflict state.
Added 'Net prompt' tab to the Settings modal wiring in the new Net Prompt DC.
Enlarged the 'scan' Callout loader from 30px to 40px.
Removed the manual loaderPhase workaround now that OrganicLoader self-staggers automatically per instance.

entries.note: pulled base DS with the OrganicLoader desync fix (reads inline animation value, caches base delay) + rebuilt bundle — components, tokens, styles.css, _ds_bundle.js, manifest.

files.note: Enlarged the 'scan' Callout loader from 22px to 30px.

entries.note: pulled base DS after an upstream change — tokens, components, guidelines, assets, styles.css, _ds_bundle.js, manifest, readme, SKILL.

files.note: Switched the agent-working/branch-conflict Callout OrganicLoader from 'ripple' to 'scan' blob variant; added a deterministic per-PR loader phase so cards desync.

entries.note: pulled base DS — tokens, components, guidelines, assets, styles.css, _ds_bundle.js, manifest, readme, SKILL.

files.note: Reverted all sticky settings-modal header/tab changes back to non-sticky.
Made the whole settings modal header (title + close/esc) sticky along with the tab nav so none of it moves on scroll.
Made the settings modal tab nav sticky to the top of the scroll area per Chris's comment.
Increased settings modal backdrop blur from 2px to 8px per Chris's comment.
Split settings modal into three tabs — 'Appearance' (default view + theme), 'Agent setup', and 'Worker sensitivity'.
Added tabs to the settings modal — 'General' (default view, theme, agent setup) and 'Worker sensitivity' — moving the sensitivity panel onto its own tab.
New 'actively working' On/Off header control with Off/On/winding-down states, stones loader for winding-down, toggle above a right-aligned subtext.

Swapped the On/Off working toggle into the dashboard and swimlanes headers, moved the Dashboard/Swimlanes view toggle into Settings as 'Default view', and moved Worker Sensitivity to the top of the settings panel under Theme.
